title: spergula morisonii var. granulata
intro: Spergula morisonii var. granulata, also known as the granulated spurry or corn spurry, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Spergula morisonii var. granulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
